# Suneeta Modekurty

> Suneeta Modekurty quantifies AI risk for regulated organizations. She holds an O-1A visa for extraordinary ability in AI, data science, and bioinformatics, is an ISO/IEC 42001 Lead Auditor, and instructs O'Reilly's live training "Quantifying AI Risk."

## What Suneeta does
- AI risk advisory and consulting for regulated industries
- Quantifies AI risk — measurable, defensible, in numbers a board can act on
- Executive AI risk training

## Key facts
- O-1A visa: extraordinary ability in AI, data science, bioinformatics
- ISO/IEC 42001 Lead Auditor
- Instructor, O'Reilly "Quantifying AI Risk" (NPS 67, 101 practitioners)
- First author, Journal of Clinical Oncology (ASCO 2024)
- Author, "The AI-Human Synergy" (2024)
- MS in Bioinformatics & Data Science, Indiana University

## Pages
- Home: https://www.suneetamodekurty.com
